description_long: This doll features a stylized skeleton character with a large, rounded skull, prominent black eye sockets, and a wide, toothy grin. It is dressed in a light blue hooded jacket with a white collar, black shorts with a white vertical stripe, and white shoes. The doll stands on a textured, orange, circular base that resembles a tiled or patterned floor. The arms are positioned at the sides, slightly bent, and the hands are tucked into the jacket pockets, giving a relaxed and casual posture. The back of the doll shows the hood draped over the shoulders and the jacket's fit around the torso. The overall design is cartoonish and playful, with smooth, simplified features and bold color contrasts.
description: A cartoonish skeleton doll in a blue hoodie, black shorts, and white shoes, standing on an orange patterned base with a wide grin and hands in pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's smiling face, blue jacket, black shorts, and both white shoes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the skull, the arm bent with the hand in the pocket, and the side of the jacket and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the hood of the jacket, and the back of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the same arm-in-pocket pose and the side of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual streetwear style with a light blue hooded jacket featuring a white collar, black knee-length shorts with a white vertical stripe, and plain white shoes. The look is reminiscent of relaxed, urban cartoon fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent and hands tucked into the jacket pockets, legs straight and feet flat on the base, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with a wide, toothy grin, large black eye sockets, and no visible eyebrows, giving a cheerful and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No hair; the head is a smooth, bald skull.
